scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:shared && turbo run dev --parallel
scripts.dev:bot: pnpm run build:shared && turbo run dev --parallel --filter=@qltracker/contracts --filter=@qltracker/config --filter=@qltracker/bot
scripts.dev:provisioner: pnpm run build:shared && turbo run dev --parallel --filter=@qltracker/contracts --filter=@qltracker/config --filter=@qltracker/provisioner
scripts.dev:realtime: pnpm run build:shared && turbo run dev --parallel --filter=@qltracker/contracts --filter=@qltracker/config --filter=@qltracker/realtime
scripts.dev:web: pnpm run build:shared && turbo run dev --parallel --filter=@qltracker/web
